violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Need screens on the windows of the trailer.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Using scented bleach. Need regular unscented bleach.
General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Need screens on the windows.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
